title: The Mist
description: Generating far out from spawn, The Mist is all snow biomes, foggy, and dangerous. from u.u.
body:
This mod adds the Mist from Unstable Universe to the game. Generating from X -750K - 750K and Z: -2.525M to -4.275M, this terrain is all foggy and snow biomes. Adds extra chest loot to find (chest loot is buggy and may not work.
second mod of the uu terrain pack
